import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
let a = match string.parse_int(tokens.get(0).ok_or(0)?)
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

fn parse_at(_ tokens: List<String>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    match string.parse_int(s)
    when Some(n)
      n
    when None
      0
    end
  when None
    0
  end
end

let av = parse_at(tokens, 0)
let bv = parse_at(tokens, 1)
let sv = parse_at(tokens, 2)

mut out = ""
mut cur = av
mut first = true
while cur < bv
  if first
    out = "#{cur}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{cur}"
  end
  cur = cur + sv
end
print(out)
